description: Pre-configured demo scenario for showcasing all 6 agents with realistic industrial data

demo_narrative.situation: Plant manager preparing for quarterly management review and upcoming statutory audit
key_concerns: Pump P-104 showing high vibration — predict failure probability
Heat exchanger E-104 due for inspection — what are compliance requirements?
Recent bearing failure on P-201 — has this happened before?
Compressor C-101 shutdown planned — what is the isolation sequence?
Pressure vessel V-103 certificate expiring in 30 days — auto-generate audit package

demo_queries.query: What is the recommended maintenance procedure for centrifugal pump mechanical seal replacement?
Predict failure probability for pump P-104 over the next 90 days
Check compliance status for pressure vessel V-103 against PESO and IBR requirements

gaps.issue: Pressure test due in 30 days — certificate expiring 2025-08-18

gaps.action: Notify PESO inspector and schedule inspection

demo_queries.query: Show me all historical bearing failures on centrifugal pumps in Unit-01

expected_output.common_root_cause: Inadequate lubrication — oil contamination with water
expected_output.warning: Current conditions on P-101 match pre-failure state from INC-2023-0042
expected_output.recommendation: Check seal flush system on P-101 immediately

demo_queries.query: If compressor C-101 fails, what equipment is affected downstream?

isolation_sequence: Lock out electrical supply at MCC-03 Panel 2

demo_queries.query: Generate audit evidence package for V-103 pressure vessel

recent_maintenance.findings: Vibration 8.2 mm/s RMS — elevated but within alarm limit

compliance_gaps.issue: Pressure test certificate expiring in 30 days

recent_inspection.findings: Tube fouling detected — cleaning recommended at next shutdown

demo_reset_instructions: Run: ./devops/scripts/reset_demo.sh to restore this clean state
